name: ListTerminals
description: List all physical point-of-sale terminals available to your account. This endpoint returns a paginated list of all terminals registered to your Mollie account, including their status, brand, model, and other details. Terminals are physical devices used for accepting in-person card payments.

from_.description: The terminal ID to start retrieving the list from (for pagination). Use this to navigate through pages of results by providing the ID of the last terminal from the previous page.

limit.description: The maximum number of terminals to return per page. Defaults to 10 if not specified. Maximum is typically 250.

sort.description: Sort order for the results. Use 'asc' for ascending order (oldest to newest) or 'desc' for descending order (newest to oldest). Defaults to 'desc' if not specified.

testmode.description: Enable test mode. Set to 'true' to retrieve test mode terminals, or omit for live mode.
